name: Double Tool C&D
name_jp: ダブルツール<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>＆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to a "Power Tool Dragon" or Level 4 or higher Machine-Type "Morphtronic" monster you control. While equipped: ● During your turn: It gains 1000 ATK. If it attacks, any effects of the attack target that activate or apply on the field are negated during that Battle Phase. ● During your opponent's turn: Your opponent cannot select a monster other than the equipped monster as an attack target. An opponent's monster that battles the equipped monster is destroyed at the end of the Damage Step.
eff: Equip only to a "Power Tool Dragon" or Level 4 or higher Machine-Type "Morphtronic" monster you control. While equipped: ● During your turn: It gains 1000 ATK. If it attacks, any effects of the attack target that activate or apply on the field are negated during that Battle Phase. ● During your opponent's turn: Your opponent cannot select a monster other than the equipped monster as an attack target. An opponent's monster that battles the equipped monster is destroyed at the end of the Damage Step.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Destroys battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: Equips only to a specific target
